insight: Boss.killAliveBosses(boss) kills all alive bosses in loaded chunks across all worlds; passing null kills every type, a non-null boss filters by that type. It is region-thread-safe (Folia) and reused by ButcherCommand (/boss butcher *), the BossMenu Kill Bosses button, and the Spawned Bosses menu. Scope is limited to loaded chunks; fully unloaded bosses need /boss scan first.
